catalog_row.Paper: The Chilean business cycles through the lens of a stochastic general equilibrium model
catalog_row.ModelType: Estimated open-economy New Keynesian DSGE, log-linear
catalog_row.Category: Open economy; commodity exporter; fiscal rule
catalog_row.KeyFeatures: Ricardian and non-Ricardian households; sticky wages and prices; incomplete pass-through; investment adjustment costs; copper and oil shocks; structural fiscal rule; two monetary policy regimes

status_row.paper_title: The Chilean business cycles through the lens of a stochastic general equilibrium model
status_row.raw_pdf_path: raw/mmb_papers/The Chilean business cycles through the lens of a stochastic general equilibrium model.pdf
status_row.formula_quality: first-pass OCR extraction; long fiscal and external-account equations need source review
status_row.steady_state_quality: calibration and implementation cross-check summarized; full analytical steady-state not reconstructed
status_row.notes: PDF body not read; appendix normalization absent; Dynare not run.

validation.details: English and Chinese files each contain 115 F-number references; unique numbering reaches F40.

unresolved_issues: Equations F24, F26, and F38 are abbreviated because the OCR source line-wrapped long fiscal and balance-of-payments formulas.
Some Appendix A equation labels are OCR-damaged.
Full analytical steady-state derivation remains deferred.
Runtime validation was not performed and Dynare was not run.
